zh.Wincanton, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特文卡頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Hussey於1327年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke37歲，母親Alinora D'Aubigny27歲。他於1347年與Lady Joanna Whitton在英國英格蘭薩默塞特文卡頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年在他的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.Wincanton, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特文卡頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Hussey于1327年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke37岁，母亲Alinora D'Aubigny27岁。他于1347年与Lady Joanna Whitton在英国英格兰薩默塞特文卡頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年在他的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Hussey was born in 1327, in Somerset, England, his father, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, was 37 and his mother, Alinora D'Aubigny, was 27. He married Lady Joanna Whitton in 1347, in Wincanton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1361, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Hussey est né en 1327, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alinora D'Aubigny, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joanna Whitton en 1347, à Wincanton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Hussey 1327 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke 37 und seine Mutter Alinora D'Aubigny 27. Er hat 1347 in Wincanton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Lady Joanna Whitton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Hussey è nato il nel 1327 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alinora D'Aubigny, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joanna Whitton nel 1347, nel Wincanton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Husseyが1327年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbrokeは37歳，母Alinora D'Aubignyは27歳であった。1347年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィンカントンでLady Joanna Whittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Hussey(이)가 1327년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alinora D'Aubigny(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 윈캔턴에서 Lady Joanna Whitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Hussey nasceu em 1327, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alinora D'Aubigny, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joanna Whitton em 1347, em Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1361, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Hussey родился в 1327 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alinora D'Aubigny, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joanna Whitton в 1347 г. в местности винкантон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1361 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Hussey nació en 1327, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alinora D'Aubigny, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Joanna Whitton en 1347, en Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1361, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
